title: Herald Change Event
description: Structured change event emitted by a reporter workflow (e.g., ronin_puppet) on merge to its default branch. Consumed by Herald to render Markdown changelogs and (later) Slack digests.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump when breaking changes are made.

commit_sha.description: Full 40-char SHA of the merged commit on the default branch.

commit_url.description: Permalink to the commit on GitHub.

pr_number.description: PR number that merged this commit, if discoverable. Null for direct pushes.

pr_url.description: Permalink to the PR. Null when pr_number is null.

actor.description: GitHub login of the user who authored the merge.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the merge commit (UTC).

commit_subject.description: First line of the commit message.

model.description: Model ID used for generation (e.g., 'claude-opus-4-7', 'codex-2026-04'). Recorded for debugging quality regressions.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the AI call completed (UTC).

description.description: Long-form Markdown summary (1-3 sentences). Null when the AI call failed; in that case 'error' is non-null.

headline.description: Short summary (~80 chars) for Slack digests and central activity rows. Optional.

tags.description: Free-form labels proposed by the AI (e.g., 'dependency-bump', 'security'). Optional; safe to ignore in POC rendering.

error.description: Non-null only when the AI call failed. Crier renders a stub entry in that case rather than dropping the change.

allOf.description: If description is null, error must be non-null (and vice versa).

entities.description: Entities impacted by this commit, derived deterministically from changed file paths.

type.description: Entity category. Set is intentionally small for the POC; new types added per reporter as needed.

id.description: Stable identifier for the entity within its type (e.g., role name 'gecko_t_linux_2404_talos').

files.description: Repo-relative paths of files in this commit that mapped to this entity.
